description.source: Are you encountering a login or registration issue? Follow the next steps to resolve the issue in no time!
description.target: Are you encountering a login or registration issue? Follow the next steps to resolve the issue in no time!

body:0001.source: How to resolve common registration issues?
body:0001.target: How to resolve common registration issues?

body:0004.source: Delete the pending invite via Users > Invite users > All invitations
body:0004.target: Delete the pending invite via Users > Invite users > All invitations

body:0005.source: Ask the user to register again via the homepage
body:0005.target: Ask the user to register again via the homepage

body:0007.source: Ask the user to check spam folder
body:0007.target: Ask the user to check spam folder

body:0009.source: Delete the invitation and let the user register normally
body:0009.target: Delete the invitation and let the user register normally

body:0010.source: Or retrieve the invitation token from the invitation export file
body:0010.target: Or retrieve the invitation token from the invitation export file

body:0013.source: Let them register as normal users
body:0013.target: Let them register as normal users

body:0014.source: Grant their role afterward via User options or Project settings
body:0014.target: Grant their role afterward via User options or Project settings

body:0015.source: How to resolve verification email not received?
body:0015.target: How to resolve verification email not received?

body:0016.source: Ask the user to check spam
body:0016.target: Ask the user to check spam

body:0019.source: How to resolve issues with resetting your password?
body:0019.target: How to resolve issues with resetting your password?

body:0020.source: Click Forgot password? on the login screen
body:0020.target: Click Forgot password? on the login screen

body:0022.source: Check inbox for reset link (valid for 1 hour)
body:0022.target: Check inbox for reset link (valid for 1 hour)

body:0023.source: If not received, check spam or contact support
body:0023.target: If not received, check spam or contact support

body:0024.source: How to resolve being stuck in a registration loop?
body:0024.target: How to resolve being stuck in a registration loop?

body:0025.source: Unverified accounts can’t reset passwords or re-register.
body:0025.target: Unverified accounts can’t reset passwords or re-register.

body:0026.source: Users who didn’t verify their email can’t reset their password
body:0026.target: Users who didn’t verify their email can’t reset their password

body:0027.source: They also can’t register again with the same email
body:0027.target: They also can’t register again with the same email

body:0028.source: Admins must contact support to delete the stuck user account
body:0028.target: Admins must contact support to delete the stuck user account

body:0029.source: How to resolve issues with a user not being able to access their profile settings?
body:0029.target: How to resolve issues with a user not being able to access their profile settings?

body:0030.source: Unverified users cannot access their account settings. Ask them to verify their email first.
body:0030.target: Unverified users cannot access their account settings. Ask them to verify their email first.
